summary: Notifications Center and Analytics Dashboard feature testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified - notifications page, category tabs, analytics dashboard, KPI cards, charts, and period selector all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Notification center backend uses sync PyMongo in notifications_center.py - consistent with codebase pattern
Analytics dashboard endpoint at /api/reports/dashboard/{user_id} provides comprehensive data (KPIs, daily_trend, channel_breakdown, store_comparison, per_user stats)
Frontend notifications page properly handles empty states with 'All caught up!' message
Period selector correctly updates analytics data and UI header text
Category filtering in notifications works both via data-testid attributes and API filtering
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing notifications and activity data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications Center and Analytics Dashboard tested in iteration 55. All APIs working: GET /api/notification-center/{user_id}, GET /api/notification-center/{user_id}?category={cat}, GET /api/notification-center/{user_id}/unread-count, POST /api/notification-center/{user_id}/read, POST /api/notification-center/{user_id}/read-all, GET /api/reports/dashboard/{user_id}?days={n}. Frontend: Notifications page at /notifications with category tabs (All, Leads, Tasks, Messages, Flagged, Activity). Analytics dashboard at /analytics with period selector (7D, 14D, 30D, 90D, 1Y), KPI cards, activity trend chart, channel breakdown bars, store comparison table.
